collider_bias.explanation: Conditioning on V2 does not introduce collider bias for the X -> Y effect.

ett.raw_estimand: Sum[AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, V2](P(AUX1_X) * P(AUX1_Y) * P(V1) * P[X,AUX1_X,V1,AUX1_Y](V2) * P[V2,X,V1](Y))
ett.observational_estimand: Sum[AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, V2](P(AUX1_X) * P(AUX1_Y) * P(V1) * P(V2 | AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, X) * P(Y | AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, V2, X))

nde.raw_estimand: Sum[AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1](P(AUX1_X) * P(AUX1_Y) * P(V1) * P[X,AUX1_X,V1,AUX1_Y](V2) * P[V2,X,V1](Y)) + Sum[AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1](P(AUX1_X) * P(AUX1_Y) * P(V1) * P[X,AUX1_X,V1,AUX1_Y](V2) * P[V2,X,V1](Y))
nde.observational_estimand: Sum[AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1](P(AUX1_X) * P(AUX1_Y) * P(V1) * P(V2 | AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, X) * P(Y | AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, V2, X)) + Sum[AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1](P(AUX1_X) * P(AUX1_Y) * P(V1) * P(V2 | AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, X) * P(Y | AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, V2, X))

nie.raw_estimand: Sum[AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1](P(AUX1_X) * P(AUX1_Y) * P(V1) * P[X,AUX1_X,V1,AUX1_Y](V2) * P[V2,X,V1](Y)) + Sum[AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1](P(AUX1_X) * P(AUX1_Y) * P(V1) * P[X,AUX1_X,V1,AUX1_Y](V2) * P[V2,X,V1](Y))
nie.observational_estimand: Sum[AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1](P(AUX1_X) * P(AUX1_Y) * P(V1) * P(V2 | AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, X) * P(Y | AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, V2, X)) + Sum[AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1](P(AUX1_X) * P(AUX1_Y) * P(V1) * P(V2 | AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, X) * P(Y | AUX1_X, AUX1_Y, V1, V2, X))
